question: How much cashback did I earn at SaveMart last Thursday?

retrieval_results.context:
User wants to track grocery expenses for the month, and has recorded $75 spent at SaveMart last Thursday.
User is interested in how much cashback would be earned at each stage of the shopping list.
User is planning a grocery shopping trip at SaveMart for the week, aiming to buy basic items such as milk, eggs, bread, and snacks within a $50 budget, has a SaveMart membership that earns 1% cashback on all purchases, no dietary restrictions, shopping for themselves.
User spent $50 at Sephora last week on skincare products.
User spent $100 at Gap last weekend on a new pair of jeans and a sweater.
User spent $50 at Office Depot last month for printer ink and paper.
User spent $15 on coffee and snacks and $12.99 on a sandwich and salad at The Daily Grind last week, totaling $27.99 in coffee/non-grocery expenses.
User explores buying 3 pounds of ground beef at $9.99, saving $1.98 compared to three 1-pound packs, new total $60.39.
User considers adding a 1-pound pack of ground beef at $3.99, raising total to $54.39, further over budget.
User finds a Buy One Get One 50% Off promotion on ground beef, reducing 3-pound pack to $4.99, saving $5.00, lowering total to $55.39.
